overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a video game showing a sunny Mediterranean coastal environment. The camera moves along a sandy waterfront, through a pine forest, and circles a modern tan residential building before returning to the rocky shore.

agents.ego_description: panning across the panoramic waterfront view and beginning to walk along the sandy shore

entered.detail: calm turquoise sea stretching to the horizon under a blue sky
tan sandy beach with subtle ripples and textures
rocky headland jutting into the water on the left horizon
small rocky islet visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a serene coastal scene with calm turquoise waters and a sandy beach under a bright blue sky. The camera pans left to reveal the coastline, then begins moving forward along the shore, showing distant cliffs and rocky outcrops on the horizon.

events.description: moving from open waterfront into a shaded area with pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the pine trees toward a tan building visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall Mediterranean pine trees with dense green canopies lining the shore
two-story tan stucco building with multiple windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from open beach to a tree-covered shoreline as the camera walks through tall pine trees. The tan residential building becomes visible ahead, and the water shifts to the right side of the frame as the path curves inland.

events.description: approaching the tan building and beginning to circle around its right side

agents.ego_description: approaching the residential building and walking around its right side along a concrete driveway

entered.detail: paved concrete surface surrounding the building with shadows cast by trees

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the tan two-story building and begins circling around its right side. The ground transitions from sand to concrete driveway as the building looms larger on the right, and the water reappears on the left side of the frame.

events.description: rounding the building to reveal the rocky shoreline and turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shore with the building visible in the background and clear water to the left

entered.detail: scattered large boulders and rocks along the sandy beach

segments.scene_description: Rounding the building, the scene opens back up to the waterfront, revealing a rocky shoreline with scattered boulders and vibrant turquoise water. The tan building remains visible in the background as the camera moves along the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: building rear and shaded tree area

events.description: leaving the waterfront to circle around the left side of the building into the trees

agents.ego_description: walking around the left side of the building into a shaded area with dense pine trees

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine trees providing shade behind the building

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the waterfront and circles around the left side of the building, entering a shaded area with dense pine trees. The building remains prominent on the right as the path leads into the wooded area behind the property.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on a serene open beach and winds through a residential property before disappearing into a shaded pine forest. It begins by panning across calm turquoise waters and moving forward along a sandy shore toward distant rocky cliffs. As the path curves inland, the open beach transitions into a tree-covered shoreline where a tan residential building emerges ahead and the water shifts to the right. The camera then moves from sand onto a concrete driveway to circle the right side of the two-story building, briefly opening back up to a rocky waterfront with scattered boulders. Finally, the view turns away from the coast to circle the left side of the structure, leading the camera into a dense, shaded wooded area behind the property.
